description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by lush landscaping, including a variety of trees and palm plants. The structure features clean, rectangular lines with a flat roof and large windows, emphasizing a minimalist architectural style. The front of the house includes a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a pool, bordered by a wooden deck. The exterior is predominantly white with some natural wood accents, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The house appears to have multiple entry points, with the main entrance accessible via a set of steps leading up from the patio. The overall design integrates indoor and outdoor living spaces, with ample open areas for relaxation and social gatherings.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious patio with a pool, surrounded by trees and palm plants. The exterior is white with wood accents, blending contemporary design with lush landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an elevated angle, highlighting the patio, pool, and main entrance, with dense trees on the right side.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear or side of the house, mostly obscured by trees, with the flat roof and upper story visible above the foliage.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a diagonal perspective, showing the house nestled among trees, with the flat roof and upper terrace visible.
description_view_3: View 3 provides a direct frontal view, clearly displaying the patio, pool, main entrance, and the symmetrical arrangement of outdoor seating.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide door, steps leading up from the patio, and is integrated with a covered porch area adjacent to the pool.
